title: Lead Developer
required_skills: Python, Multithreading, C++, Java, AWS, Spring Boot, Linux
description:
Job Title: Lead Developer
    Company: Amazon
    Location: Pune, India
    Department: Software Engineering
    
    ABOUT THE ROLE
    We are looking for a talented and motivated Lead Developer to join our growing team. In this role, 
    you will design, build, and optimize solutions to push the boundaries of technology. You 
    will work closely with engineering, product, and business stakeholders.
    
    RESPONSIBILITIES
    - Develop, test, and maintain high-performance applications and services.
    - Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code/models.
    - Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing systems.
    - Leverage technologies like Python, Multithreading, C++ to build scalable systems.
    - Participate in code reviews, technical architecture planning, and agile standups.
    
    REQUIREMENTS
    - Minimum 8 years of professional experience in Software Engineering or related fields.
    - Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Business, or equivalent.
    - Strong proficiency in: Python, Multithreading, C++, Java, AWS, Spring Boot, Linux.
    - Excellent problem-solving skills and communication.
    
    BENEFITS
    - Competitive salary and health benefits.
    - Flexible working hours and remote work options.
    - Continuous learning and career development opportunities.
